ops.body: LIVE VALIDATION (yBook attended, yasyf-home locked): both Macs on cookiesync+synckitd 0.12.0, keyhelper cask 0.8.0 unchanged. doctor all-OK both hosts (peer TCC pointer + two-way key-cache wording render). ORIGINAL INCIDENT INVERTED: 'cookiesync auth --reason "...edit the Tailscale ACL..."' now exit 0, authenticated 2 endpoints (was: cache-unwrap exited 3 / OSStatus -25308). Union pull from yBook: exit 0, real tailscale.com cookies, warnings empty. SIGUSR1 -> goroutine dumps land under paths dir on both serve+helper daemons, daemons keep serving. TCC log capture on peer during pull: no denials (LAN/sshd identity already granted). b2e6be7 closed structurally by the epoch KeyCache.
